docs.title: Auth service thread #engineering
docs.content:
Thread in #engineering:
alice: Hey, I think the login timeout issue we have is related to AUTH-456. The auth service keeps dropping connections after 30s.
bob: Yeah I filed that as AUTH-456 in Linear. The root cause is the session token expiry being misconfigured.
alice: Let me PR a fix. The auth service is in prbe-backend/auth.

docs.title: AUTH-456: Login timeout after 30 seconds
docs.content:
Issue AUTH-456: Login timeout after 30 seconds
Status: In Progress
Assignee: bob
Description: Users report being logged out after 30 seconds of inactivity. Root cause: auth service session token TTL misconfigured to 30s instead of 3600s.

expected_edges.note: Slack thread explicitly discusses the Linear issue AUTH-456
